G2.decision: FastAPI mounts dist/ same-origin; API moves to /api/* prefix

G4.decision: Postgres VIEW v_topic_stats via Alembic 0003; longevity_seconds in DB; frontend formats human-readable

G5.decision: GET /api/topics, sort=-field whitelist {breadth,longevity,last_seen_at}, default -last_seen_at, ?limit clamped [1,100], no filters Phase 4, wrapper response {topics, limit, sort}

G7.decision: ship minimal GET /api/topics/{id} now with nested sources; Phase 5 extends additively

G8.decision: Vite proxy in dev (/api/* → :8000); same-origin in prod; no env var

carry_forward: ARC-001 no AI in any path including read
FastAPI shell shape from Phase 3 03-02 (lazy engine, get_session, ConfigDict, wrapper responses, port 8000)
Phase 5 owns crawl_config + per-source UI control

plans_proposed.scope: /api/* re-prefix + GET /api/topics list + sort whitelist + tests
Vuetify 3 SPA scaffold at web/ (TopicList + TopicDetail + Vite proxy + formatLongevity)
api Dockerfile multi-stage (node+python) + StaticFiles mount + compose build context + smoke_phase4.sh + README + SUMMARY

open_for_plan: ORM read-entity vs raw select for v_topic_stats
Node LTS pin for Dockerfile builder + web/.nvmrc
Whether /api re-prefix folds into 04-02 or is its own micro-plan (leaning folded)
